description: AI skill catalog for SharpAI Aegis. Each skill is a self-contained folder with a SKILL.md manifest.

skills.name: YOLO Object Detection (2026)
skills.description: State-of-the-art real-time object detection using YOLOv11/YOLOv10. Person, vehicle, animal, and 80+ COCO class detection with configurable confidence thresholds.
